title: Datetime Go Plugin Configuration
description: JSON Schema for datetime-go plugin config.yaml. Mirrors fileConfig validation constraints.

timezone.description: IANA timezone string (e.g. 'Asia/Shanghai') or UTC offset label (e.g. 'UTC+09'). If omitted with no fixed offset, system timezone is used.

utc_offset_hours.description: Fixed UTC offset in hours. Lower priority than utc_offset_minutes.

utc_offset_minutes.description: Fixed UTC offset in minutes. Higher priority than utc_offset_hours.

get_current_datetime_ms.description: Timeout for get_current_datetime tool in milliseconds.
